projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Real-world systems I've built and shipped — from government-scale APIs to hackathon-winning prototypes.

plp.title: PLP — SETHAS/RN
plp.short_desc: Auditable APIs for managing the complex milk distribution flow of Programa do Leite Potiguar.
plp.challenge: Managing the complex distribution flow of milk to thousands of beneficiaries across Rio Grande do Norte, ensuring full data integrity, traceability, and fraud prevention in a government social program.
plp.solution: Developed highly auditable RESTful APIs using Django Ninja with strict schema validation, comprehensive audit trails, and database modeling designed for full traceability of every distribution event from origin to beneficiary.
impact: Full transparency in governmental data across 167 municipalities
Greater control and accountability over public resources
Fraud prevention through complete audit trails on every transaction
Real-time visibility for program managers and auditors
plp.disclaimer: Note: This is a private/governmental project with no public access to the source code, but you can check the official page at the link above.

prp.title: PRP — SETHAS/RN
prp.short_desc: ETL pipelines for automating food security data management at Programa Restaurante Popular.
prp.challenge: Modernizing food security data management for Programa Restaurante Popular, dealing with large volumes of daily meals served, slow manual processes, and the need for accurate government metrics and reporting.
prp.solution: Created intensive ETL pipelines with Pandas for automating data reconciliation and generating government metric reports. Replaced manual spreadsheet workflows with automated validation layers ensuring data consistency before persistence to PostgreSQL.
impact: Drastic reduction in operational errors through automated data validation
Faster data-driven decision making for program managers
Automated daily processing of thousands of meal records with fault tolerance
Streamlined government reporting and compliance audits
prp.disclaimer: Note: This is a private/governmental project with no public access to the source code, but you can check the official page at the link above.

crowdless.title: Crowdless — Hackathon HackaPower
crowdless.short_desc: 1st place winning prototype built under pressure with technical leadership.
crowdless.challenge: During the HackaPower hackathon, our team had limited time to conceive, architect, and deliver a functional prototype that addressed real-world crowd management challenges. The pressure demanded fast architectural decisions, clear task delegation, and a working demo by the deadline.
crowdless.solution: As Tech Lead, I organized the team's workflow, defined the system architecture, and prioritized the MVP features. We built a lightweight web application for real-time crowd density monitoring, combining a Python backend with a responsive frontend. I focused on keeping the stack simple and the integration points clean to maximize delivery speed.
impact: Won 1st place at HackaPower hackathon
Delivered a fully functional prototype within the time constraint
Demonstrated technical leadership and team coordination under pressure
Validated the concept with judges and mentors
crowdless.disclaimer: Note: This is a hackathon project. You can check the official event page at the link above.
